full_text: van der Gugten to Erasmus, Caught by Scott Edwards!! van der Gugten finally breaks the stand! Is it too late though? Seems like it. Was a slower ball, widish length and Erasmus went chasing, only to get a tiny feather on it. Easily taken by Scott Edwards and the Dutch get some respite from the onslaught, even if it isn't the batter who caused maximum damage. Erasmus takes the review almost as an afterthought but there was clearly an edge and UltraEdge confirms it. The captain has to depart, but he has done a good job, stitching what you'd think is a match-winning stand.

short_text: Seelaar to Baard, Bowled!! The spin choke is on from the Dutch! And Namibia's batters don't seem to have an answer to it
full_text: Seelaar to Baard, Bowled!! The spin choke is on from the Dutch! And Namibia's batters don't seem to have an answer to it. This is an accurate slider from Seelaar, keeps a fraction low as Baard looks to defend with hard hands. Brushes the pads and then disturbs the woodwork behind him. Namibia are struggling now. Wickets falling, the asking rate mounting as well.

full_text: Ackermann to Craig Williams, Bowled!! Poor shot and Williams has thrown it away. Craftily bowled by Ackermann, gave this just a bit of air and hung the length back a bit, tempting the batter into the big shot. Williams goes for a wild hoick across the line, a nothing stroke earlly and ended up missing it completely. Don't think he'll prefer to see the replay of this when he gets back to the dugout.

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Zane Green, Bowled!! No need of an appeal this time! Klaassen has his man. Dug this into the surface and offered no pace at all. Green pounced on the length but didn't read the pace properly. Early on the pull stroke, only to get an under-edge onto the sticks. Timely strike for the Dutch because the openers were just starting to find their range.

short_text: van Beek to Baard, no run, The direct hit isn't on target and tell you what, even if Scott Edwards had gathered this cle
full_text: van Beek to Baard, no run, The direct hit isn't on target and tell you what, even if Scott Edwards had gathered this cleanly, could have easily still got the run out. But he isn't upto the stumps for the throw and the chance goes. Was a short of a length ball, Baard dabbed it to point and there was a huge mix up in the running. Was forced to abort the single, but it was very very late. Massive slice of luck
